title: Wrong Result in Cast Blob to Json
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

```sql
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t0 VALUES ('1xx');

SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE CAST(t0.c0 AS JSON);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

see the following case:

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
// MySQL 8.4.1
MySQL [test]> SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE CAST(t0.c0 AS JSON);
+------+
| c0   |
+------+
| 1xx  |
+------+
1 row in set, 1 warning (0.00 sec)

// TiDB
mysql> SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE CAST(t0.c0 AS JSON);
+------------+
| c0         |
+------------+
| 0x317878   |
+------------+
1 row in set (0.04 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

TiDB v8.5.0
poc: SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE CAST(t0.c0 AS JSON);
key_bug_features: CAST BLOB to JSON in SQL query
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE t_cast (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, c_blob BLOB, c_vb VARBINARY(32), c_txt TEXT, c_json JSON NULL);
CREATE TABLE t_ref (rid INT PRIMARY KEY, tag VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, flag TINYINT, dt DATETIME, j JSON);
INSERT INTO t_cast(c_blob,c_vb,c_txt,c_json) VALUES ('true',x'74727565','true',CAST('true' AS JSON));
SELECT id FROM t_cast WHERE CAST(c_blob AS JSON);
SELECT id FROM t_cast WHERE CAST(c_vb AS JSON) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM t_cast WHERE CAST(c_txt AS JSON) = CAST('true' AS JSON);
SELECT a.id FROM t_cast a JOIN t_ref b ON (a.id % 2) = b.rid WHERE CAST(a.c_blob AS JSON) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id,c_blob FROM t_cast WHERE id >= 1) s WHERE CAST(s.c_blob AS JSON);
UPDATE t_cast SET c_blob = CONCAT(c_txt,'') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id FROM t_cast WHERE CAST(c_blob AS JSON) = CAST('{"a":1}' AS JSON);
DELETE FROM t_cast WHERE CAST(c_blob AS JSON) IS NULL;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 BLOB NOT NULL, c2 INT DEFAULT 0);
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE CAST(c1 AS JSON);
